name: Pure Energy Minerals Limited
description: Pure Energy Minerals Limited is a lithium-brine resource developer focused on the exploration and development of lithium deposits in North America. The company's flagship project is the Clayton Valley Lithium Brine project located in Esmeralda County, Nevada. Pure Energy aims to become a low-cost supplier of lithium to support the growing North American lithium battery industry. Headquartered in Vancouver, Canada, the company holds extensive claim blocks and has reported inferred resources in lithium carbonate equivalent, positioning itself as a key player in the development of critical mineral resources for the energy transition.
